description: Recto (original use): Legal document in Arabic script. The ends of four lines are preserved. Mentions a sum of 20 dinars (min al-ʿayn al-wāzin ʿashrīn dīnār) and repeats twice that someone testified something (shahida ʿalā nafsihī). Mentions a date of 49[.] AH = 1096–1106 CE as part of the repayment terms. The creditor is probably [...] al-Muqaddasī (l. 3).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
